personal.name: Anjani Kumar
personal.title: B.Tech CSE Student
personal.tagline: Building innovative software solutions with code & creativity
personal.bio: I'm a motivated B.Tech CSE student with a strong interest in software development, problem-solving, and artificial intelligence. Skilled in Java, Python, OOPs, and DSA, with hands-on project experience in developing a virtual assistant.
personal.intro: Hi, I'm Anjani! I'm a 1st year B.Tech CSE student at ITER College, Bhubaneswar, passionate about building software solutions, solving complex problems, and exploring artificial intelligence. I specialize in Java, Python, and modern development practices.
